name: Wheat Free Pie Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients well until a dough forms.
2. Press the dough into a pie plate using your fingers.
3. Prick the dough with a fork several times.
4. For a precooked crust, bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes.
Source: Arrowhead Mills "Recipes for Special Dietary Needs"
